summary:
Claim: Endorez is the only commercially available endoseal containing urethane dimethacrylate (UDMA).  
Evidence: - Peer-reviewed studies confirm Endorez’s UDMA formulation improves sealing performance and reduces microleakage. - Manufacturer datasheets and AAE-endorsed literature list UDMA as an active component in Endorez, not in Tubli Seal.  
Answer: A  

(Note: This summary maintains all critical factual elements while reducing redundancy.)

Final output must follow this structure exactly:

Claim: [One clear sentence]  
Evidence: [- Fact 1; - Fact 2]  
Answer: <A/B/C/D>
